title: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel
wikitext:
[]: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by Retro Chocolate » Mon Feb 22, 2016 9:42 pm So I finally decided that I was going to play girlfriend of steel. I download it off the internet, but when I tried to start it, it didn't work. When I launch the executable, the cursor changes to the loading cursor for a second and then it stops. The game never starts up.I tried running it in compatibility mode for windows 7 and windows xp but it still didn't work. I think it's probably just that it doesn't work on windows 10, but I wanted to make sure. Do I have to have it in a specific directory? And has anyone else tried running this in windows 10? and lastly, are there any fixes to this? Thanks.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Feb 23, 2016 4:38 am I failed to get it going in Windows 7 or 8, even with an actual CD in my hand.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by Retro Chocolate » Tue Feb 23, 2016 10:23 am I figured it was something like that, but i just wanted to make sure. Thanks for the help.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Feb 23, 2016 7:03 pm pwhodges wrote: I failed to get it going in Windows 7 or 8, even with an actual CD in my hand.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Feb 23, 2016 7:12 pm Interesting, thanks!

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by marynou » Sat Jan 14, 2017 1:10 pm Digging this up as I have the EXACT same problem. The link didn't really help me as I'm running Windows 10 and couldn't find the required driver. There were instructions to enable it for sure, but they aren't working on this version of Windows. Could somebody lend me a hand please? I really am bad at computer stuff...

Article: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel
[]: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by Retro Chocolate » Mon Feb 22, 2016 9:42 pm So I finally decided that I was going to play girlfriend of steel. I download it off the internet, but when I tried to start it, it didn't work. When I launch the executable, the cursor changes to the loading cursor for a second and then it stops. The game never starts up.I tried running it in compatibility mode for windows 7 and windows xp but it still didn't work. I think it's probably just that it doesn't work on windows 10, but I wanted to make sure. Do I have to have it in a specific directory? And has anyone else tried running this in windows 10? and lastly, are there any fixes to this? Thanks.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Feb 23, 2016 4:38 am I failed to get it going in Windows 7 or 8, even with an actual CD in my hand.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by Retro Chocolate » Tue Feb 23, 2016 10:23 am I figured it was something like that, but i just wanted to make sure. Thanks for the help.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Feb 23, 2016 7:03 pm pwhodges wrote: I failed to get it going in Windows 7 or 8, even with an actual CD in my hand.

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Feb 23, 2016 7:12 pm Interesting, thanks!

[]: Re: Problems Running Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by marynou » Sat Jan 14, 2017 1:10 pm Digging this up as I have the EXACT same problem. The link didn't really help me as I'm running Windows 10 and couldn't find the required driver. There were instructions to enable it for sure, but they aren't working on this version of Windows. Could somebody lend me a hand please? I really am bad at computer stuff...
